notes: Scenario 2.17 trailing-? path for mistral-vibe. Vibe emits a plain-text terminal turn_done (role assistant, no tool_calls) whose AssistantText ends in '?'; the generic classifier's IsWaitingForUserInput → state_classifier.go rule 2a drives ready → working → waiting. The recipe stops at the waiting episode and does NOT answer. Vibe emits no explicit waiting signal — this is the agent-agnostic path, same as claudecode. Observations: agent exact-match + tokens_nonzero (sidecar stats.context_tokens, emitted on turn_done); model left provisional (NormalizeModelName transform) for record to pin; cost NOT asserted (sidecar reads no cost field). BACKFLOW (re-spec): mistral-vibe is a presession adapter -- birth re-modeled as presession_birth -> session_birth (new_session, different session_id) templated from the codex sibling; observations now assert agent only (cost & tokens are sidecar-only, unverifiable in the offline replay golden, like kiro-cli), superseding any model/tokens claim above.

text: proc-<PID> pre-session appears in ready within 1s of launch (PID bound before the transcript dir exists)
Real session_<id> reconciles (different session_id) when the transcript directory appears, born ready
vibe PID bound to the real session (matched by cwd)
Terminal turn_done AssistantText ends in '?' -> waiting (IsWaitingForUserInput -> rule 2a); recipe stops here
